strategy: Removed the 5 console.log example lines and the 'Best Practices' sub-section from the Debugging section, consolidating the 4 instruction bullets into 1 sentence — these examples and bullets restated what the preceding prose already explained

Removed Examples 2, 3, 4 from the Alignment section (Vercel API lookup, web-fetch request, competitor comparison) — three trivial examples that only demonstrate calling WebSearch/WebFetch, behaviors obvious from the tool descriptions; renumbered Example 5 to Example 2

Removed Examples 11 and 12 from Alignment section (header text read and env var error) — trivial single-tool examples that add no alignment signal beyond what the codebase-read and system-action tool descriptions already convey

Removed the 3 duplicate storage/localStorage bullets from the second integration guidelines section (lines ~351-353) which were already stated verbatim in the Data Persistence section; condensed the remaining 4 integration bullets into 3 by merging the env-var and UI-config rules

Removed the 7-line Use Cases list from the Executable Scripts section (Creating/seeding databases, migrations, data processing, etc.) — these are illustrative examples of when to use scripts, not rules, and the section already makes the scripts feature clear without them

Removed the two code-block examples from the Using Fonts with Next.js section (layout.tsx and tailwind.config.js snippets, 35 lines total) — the rules above them already specify what to do; the examples added no additional constraint

Removed the Before Making Changes sub-section (4 bullets: right file, parent handler, existing utilities, architecture fit) — these questions duplicate the Understand the Full System bullets immediately above which cover the same checks with more specific guidance

Condensed the 4-bullet settings options list (Design/Rules/Vars/Settings) in v0 Capabilities into a single inline list — the detailed descriptions of each setting option add no actionable information for the model
Replaced the 4-sentence prose description of Cache Components with a 1-sentence summary — the code examples that follow already illustrate the feature precisely; the prose was redundant narration

Removed the Don't Stop at the First Match sub-section (3 bullets about examining all files, checking component variants, looking beyond obvious) from Context Gathering — the Understand the Full System section already covers these search thoroughness principles with more specific guidance

Condensed the Git section in v0 Capabilities from 5 lines to 1 — removed the if-connected/not-connected branching and the Actions include list, keeping only the key fact that git is managed via settings and changes go to the branch shown there

Condensed the Use Parallel Tool Calls paragraph from 8 sentences to 2 — the original repeated the parallel/sequential distinction 4 times; the compressed version preserves both the core rule and the exception

Removed Example 1 (General Question - What is life?) from Alignment section — avg similarity dropped below 0.92 threshold, suggesting this example contributes to general response quality even though it shows no tool use

Removed Example 6 (Form Styling Update) from Alignment section — this short example showing Glob+Read+update is the simplest codebase-modification pattern and is already illustrated more thoroughly by Example 8 (auth refactoring)

Condensed the Typography section from 11 lines to 1 — merged the Required Font Structure header plus 2 bullets and the Typography Implementation Rules header plus 2 bullets into a single sentence; the original had the 2-font-family rule stated twice (heading and bullet)

Compressed gradient rules section and merged two duplicate text-color-override bullets — min similarity dropped to 0.82, indicating the gradient color rules (analogous colors, opposing temperatures, max stops) are load-bearing for at least one test input
Merged two duplicate text-color-override bullets in Color System (If you override background... + Be sure to override...) into one sentence — same rule stated twice

Removed both React 19.2 code block examples (useEffectEvent ChatRoom example and Activity sidebar example), keeping only the 1-line feature descriptions — the code blocks illustrated usage but the feature names and descriptions already convey the API contract

Removed Example 9 (Database Integration - Add Likes) from Alignment section — this example showing GetOrRequestIntegration + migration + Grep + implement is a subset of what Example 10 (Supabase Waitlist) demonstrates more completely with plan mode

Replaced the revalidateTag code block example with an inline description listing the valid cacheLife parameter forms — the code block added 8 lines but the information (supported values) fits in one sentence
